text:
In the distribution file TROUBLE.TXT, the word 'chose' should
be 'choose'

Fix: 

Diff for TROUBLE.TXT : 

22c22
< To invoke fixit, simply boot the boot floppy, chose the "Fixit" item
---

How-To-Repeat: Look in TROUBLE.TXT
